title: Pluribus
overview: The most miserable person on Earth must save the world from happiness.
reason: Critically acclaimed with an 87 Metascore and an 8.0 IMDb rating from over 127,000 votes. Created by renowned showrunner Vince Gilligan and features a strong lead actress on Apple TV.

title: The Beast in Me
overview: A famous author is pulled into a twisted mind game with her rich, powerful new neighbor — who might be a murderer.
reason: Highly rated with a 7.4 IMDb score from over 61,000 votes and a 71 Metascore. Features Emmy-winning actors Claire Danes and Matthew Rhys on the global platform Netflix.

title: HIS & HERS
overview: Two estranged spouses — one a detective, the other a news reporter — vie to solve a murder in which each believes the other is a prime suspect.
reason: Popular on Netflix with over 65,000 IMDb votes and a 7.2 rating. Boasts a strong ensemble cast including Tessa Thompson and Jon Bernthal.

title: All Her Fault
overview: In Chicago, Marissa Irvine arrives at 14 Arthur Avenue, expecting to pick up her young son Milo from his first playdate with a boy at his new school. But the woman who answers the door isn't a mother she recognizes. She isn't the nanny. She doesn't have Milo. And so begins every parent's worst nightmare.
reason: Features Emmy-winning actress Sarah Snook and holds a strong 7.5 IMDb rating from over 38,000 votes, indicating significant viewer engagement.

title: Wonder Man
overview: Simon and Trevor, two actors at opposite ends of their careers, chase life-changing roles.
reason: Part of the globally popular Marvel Cinematic Universe on Disney+, featuring Emmy-winning actor Yahya Abdul-Mateen II and a solid 7.6 IMDb rating.
